assessment_meta.notes: Real manual screen using listing evidence plus limited public planning-context checks. Conservative placeholders retained where authoritative site-report fields were not fully verified in-session.

site.access_notes: Standard residential access assumed from listing context. No explicit dual-access or corner-block advantage identified in this pass.

residential_subdivision_use_case.notes: Target use case matches MVP scope. Real Sunshine Coast residential site suitable for screen testing.

current_zone.notes: Current zone not verified from authoritative council mapping/site report in this pass.

local_plan_precinct.notes: Local plan / precinct not verified in this pass. Coastal urban context may matter materially but was not confirmed.

minimum_lot_size.notes: Minimum lot size or equivalent subdivision threshold not verified from authoritative planning controls.

effective_yield.notes: Site area is modest at 607sqm and listing only suggests scope to enhance, not a clear redevelopment pathway. No reliable indicative lot count should be asserted.

frontage_access.notes: No verified frontage or access advantage established in this pass.

flood.notes: Flood status not verified from authoritative mapping in this pass. Coastal context increases the importance of this check.

steep_land_landslide.notes: Steep land / landslide overlays not verified from authoritative mapping in this pass.

biodiversity_waterways.notes: Biodiversity / waterway constraints not verified from authoritative mapping in this pass. Coastal proximity may make this more material.

prior_application_history.notes: Prior application history not checked in Development.i / PD Online equivalent during this pass.

critical_unknowns: Minimum lot size / subdivision threshold not verified
Steep land / landslide status not checked
next_actions: Obtain authoritative site report or council mapping output for zoning and local plan / precinct
Verify minimum lot size and any frontage requirements from applicable planning controls
Check flood, steep land / landslide, and biodiversity / waterways overlays
Check prior development application history for the site
Confirm whether site shape, frontage and coastal-context controls materially constrain subdivision potential
